history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A black and white, grainy, artistic photograph captures a person's back as they look into a mirror. The person, with curly, dark hair, is shown from behind, with one arm raised and hand on their head, as if adjusting their hair. Their muscular back and shoulders are visible, illuminated by soft light. They are wearing dark shorts. The mirror reflects a dimly lit room with a bed in the background. To the left of the frame, a close-up of the person's ear and messy, dark hair is visible, adding a sense of intimacy and raw texture to the image. The overall mood is contemplative and slightly moody, enhanced by the high contrast black and white tones and the film grain effect.
